title: Did I Forget Something?
description:
AKA Vanilla with Sprinkles.

This modpack is meant to be the store-bought vanilla cake batter mix for other Vanilla+ style modpacks.
body:
This inoffensive compilation of mods is meant to be the vanilla cake batter of other Vanilla++++ modpacks. They're what's usually expected from these kinds of modpacks,

It includes:
* Optimization mods that try not to compromise mod comparability.
* Client side tweaks that make navigating UI's easier
* Minor Vanilla+ features like HT Treechop, Crawl, and Journey Map,
* Bigger Vanilla+ style mods and their addons that everyone loves like Farmer's Delight and Supplementaries. (Some of the mods that I thought were too controversial, come disabled)


Here's the mod list (again, some come disabled)
- [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/r0v8vy1s) by Space Walker
